dimensions.label: Dynamic agent management
dimensions.rationale: 5 assignable agents, 3 optional reviewers, 10 work lanes.

dimensions.label: User-facing interface clarity
dimensions.rationale: 5 human decisions across 3 batches; v10 exposes summary panels but decision execution still requires clearer user actions.

dimensions.label: Ralph loop drive
dimensions.rationale: 9 must-act roles are generated from stale/attention/improvement evidence.

dimensions.label: Human gate compression
dimensions.rationale: 5 items still need human decision; digest batching exists but should be directly visible in v10.

userShouldSee: what Ralph says must act next
what evidence verifies the system state

evidence: OpenAI Agents SDK tracing uses traces/spans for agent runs, tools, handoffs, guardrails, and custom events.
OpenTelemetry correlates logs, traces, and metrics through trace/span/resource context.
LangGraph Studio-style observability emphasizes graph/state debugging and traced runs.
HITL patterns require clear pause/approval points instead of hidden autonomous mutation.
Agent Map v10 cockpit panel contract
Turn stale issue pressure into visible user/agent next actions
Compress user decisions into fewer explicit action cards
Separate available agents from optional role pools

recommendations.title: Turn stale issue pressure into visible user/agent next actions
recommendations.action: Expose stale/attention/needs-human counts in one v10 cockpit and route to Ralph Role Drive commands.

recommendations.title: Compress user decisions into fewer explicit action cards
recommendations.action: Show decision batches instead of raw issue lists; only ask the user for irreversible or credential decisions.

recommendations.title: Separate available agents from optional role pools
recommendations.action: Keep Gemini/OpenCode/Stitch assist-only until a live session marker or verified local command exists.
